issue_summary: Serious performance degradation in Solr 6.4.1 due to the new metrics collection.
javadoc_before:
/** * Currently the following arguments are supported: *
    *
  • directoryDetails - (optional bool) when true then additional detailed metrics * will be collected. These include eg. IO size histograms and per-file counters and histograms
    • *
* @param args init args */
javadoc_after:
/** * Currently the following arguments are supported: *
    *
  • directory - (optional bool, default false) when true then coarse-grained metrics will be collected.
    • *
  • directoryDetails - (optional bool, default false) when true then additional detailed metrics * will be collected. These include eg. IO size histograms and per-file counters and histograms
    • *
* NOTE: please be aware that collecting even coarse-grained metrics can have significant performance impact * (see SOLR-10130). * @param args init args */
